message:
feat: wire commands and events (clear, switch_model, session_resume, context_update)

- Handle clear command to reset history
- Handle switch_model command to pass model preference to factory
- Wire /model and /status slash commands in CLI
- Emit session_resume event on first submitGoal with existing history
- Emit context_update event after plan_end with context token data

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
